description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a combination of flat and gable roofs, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with trees and shrubs. The front features a double garage, a driveway, and a well-maintained lawn, while the rear includes a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a covered outdoor living space. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The structure is primarily constructed from light-colored materials, with dark roofing and wooden or composite accents. The backyard is expansive, offering both green space and recreational amenities. The overall design emphasizes open, functional living with a blend of indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern bungalow with a double garage, large windows, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool with patio. The design features both flat and gable roofs and a mix of light and dark exterior materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, patio, covered outdoor area, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the gable roof, garage, and expansive backyard lawn with minimal landscaping.
description_view_2: Street-facing view with double garage, driveway, main entrance, and symmetrical front lawn.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the transition from the driveway to the backyard, with visible pool and patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on rear and front facades
